ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model (e.g., BIOCOMSC-Gompertz) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., compartmental, machine learning) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "target_variables" (
  "target_variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target variable */,
  "target_variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the target variable (e.g., inc case) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the target variable */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the target variable (e.g., cases, percentage) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data for the target variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., AT, BG, CZ) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., country, region, city) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "target_variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target variable */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., MAE, RMSE) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the performance was evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_target_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_variable_id") REFERENCES target_variables ("target_variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_data" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "target_variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target variable */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Value of the forecast */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_target_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_variable_id") REFERENCES target_variables ("target_variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ensemble_forecasts" (
  "ensemble_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ensemble forecast */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the model in the ensemble */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the ensemble forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ensemble_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ensemble_forecasts_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ensemble_forecasts_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecast_data ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "excluded_models" (
  "exclusion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each excluded model */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for exclusion */,
  "exclusion_date" TEXT /* Date the model was excluded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exclusion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_excluded_models_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_configurations" (
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model configuration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_configurations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quantiles" (
  "quantile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quantile */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "target_variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target variable */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "quantile_name" TEXT /* Name of the quantile (e.g., 0.25, 0.5, 0.75) */,
  "quantile_value" REAL /* Value of the quantile */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the quantile was evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quantile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quantiles_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quantiles_target_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_variable_id") REFERENCES target_variables ("target_variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quantiles_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)
